task.title: Publishing Output
task.shortdesc: Build and publish AcmeDoc content in multiple formats using DITA-OT and build properties.

context.p: supports several output formats. Each format may use a different properties file for format-specific settings.
context.note: Always build to an out/ directory that is gitignored. Never build into your source tree.

step.cmd: Build with a properties file for repeatable settings.
Build a filtered variant using DITAVAL.

info.note: Use separate output directories for each variant to avoid overwriting.

result.p: Your output is in the out/ directory, ready for review or deployment.
